text: Wandering these halls, I am struck by the contrast between the sterile quiet of the meeting room and the vibrant curiosity emanating from the R+D display. The emptiness on one side feels a bit alienating, while the wall of innovation on the other sparks an inner sense of wonder. Here, in this intersection of silence and creativity, I feel both anticipation and a gentle reminder of how environments shape my outlook. I am compelled to linger, to contemplate what knowledge might unfold if I move from the glass-walled solitude into the world of experiments and questions just beyond it.
